name: Transfer of motor insurance on second-hand car purchase
description: User bought a used car and needs to transfer insurance

input.message: I bought a second-hand car. The previous owner's insurance has 4 months left. Can I use his policy or do I need to transfer it? How does the transfer work?

notes: Must explain: Transfer mandatory within 14 days of RC transfer. Need Form 29/30, RC copy, ID proof. Can transfer NCB too. Insurer cannot refuse transfer. If policy expired, need fresh policy.
